name: solc-version
text:
Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3943)

name: use-ownable2step
text: By demanding that the receiver of the owner permissions actively accept via a contract call of its own,  `Ownable2Step` and `Ownable2StepUpgradeable` prevent the contract ownership from accidentally being transferred  to an address that cannot handle it.

name: unnecessary-checked-arithmetic-in-loop
text: A lot of times there is no risk that the loop counter can overflow.  Using Solidity's unchecked block saves the overflow checks.

name: array-length-outside-loop
text: Caching the array length outside a loop saves reading it on each iteration, as long as the array's length is not changed during the loop.

name: reentrancy-no-eth
text:
Reentrancy in PharmaCompany.buyMedicine(string,address,uint256,address,uint256) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4060-4066):
	External calls:
	- require(bool,string)(IHospitalManagement(hospital).authorizeSale(prescriptionId,to,medicineName,amount),Sale not authorized) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4064)
	- _safeTransferFrom(owner(),to,medicines[medicineName],amount,bytes(medicineName)) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4065)
		- response = IERC1155Receiver(to).onERC1155Received(operator,from,id,value,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#574-588)
		- response = IERC1155Receiver(to).onERC1155BatchReceived(operator,from,ids,values,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#609-625)
		- ERC1155Utils.checkOnERC1155Received(operator,from,to,id,value,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3712)
		- ERC1155Utils.checkOnERC1155BatchReceived(operator,from,to,ids,values,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3714)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _safeTransferFrom(owner(),to,medicines[medicineName],amount,bytes(medicineName)) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4065)
		- _balances[id][from] = fromBalance - value (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3672)
		- _balances[id][to] += value (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3677)
	ERC1155._balances (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3541) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC1155._update(address,address,uint256[],uint256[]) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3654-3688)
	- ERC1155.balanceOf(address,uint256) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3578-3580)

name: reentrancy-events
text:
Reentrancy in PharmaCompany.buyMedicine(string,address,uint256,address,uint256) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4060-4066):
	External calls:
	- require(bool,string)(IHospitalManagement(hospital).authorizeSale(prescriptionId,to,medicineName,amount),Sale not authorized) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4064)
	- _safeTransferFrom(owner(),to,medicines[medicineName],amount,bytes(medicineName)) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4065)
		- response = IERC1155Receiver(to).onERC1155Received(operator,from,id,value,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#574-588)
		- response = IERC1155Receiver(to).onERC1155BatchReceived(operator,from,ids,values,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#609-625)
		- ERC1155Utils.checkOnERC1155Received(operator,from,to,id,value,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3712)
		- ERC1155Utils.checkOnERC1155BatchReceived(operator,from,to,ids,values,data) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3714)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- TransferBatch(operator,from,to,ids,values) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3686)
		- _safeTransferFrom(owner(),to,medicines[medicineName],amount,bytes(medicineName)) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4065)
	- TransferSingle(operator,from,to,id_scope_0,value_scope_1) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#3684)
		- _safeTransferFrom(owner(),to,medicines[medicineName],amount,bytes(medicineName)) (../sb/SupplyChain_F.sol#4065)
